heading: Are you claiming for a specific sum of money?
maxClaimAmountLabel: What's the maximum value of your claim?
specificFeeText:
Your counterclaim fee (the fee you will pay to make this counterclaim) depends on the amount you're claiming for.

If you want to check how much your fee will be, you can estimate how much it will cost you to make your counterclaim (opens in new tab)
noSpecificFeeText:
If you do not know the specific sum you're claiming for, the court needs to know what you believe the maximum value of your claim will be.

If you do not know the exact amount, give an estimate.

isClaimAmountKnown.required: Select if you are claiming for a specific sum of money

claimAmount.required: Enter how much you are claiming for
claimAmount.largeAmount: The amount you are claiming for must be less than £1 billion
claimAmount.negative: The amount you are claiming for must be £0.00 or above
claimAmount.invalidFormat: Enter how much you are claiming for in the correct format, for example £148.00 or £148.50

estimatedMaxClaimAmount.required: Enter the maximum value of your claim
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.largeAmount: The maximum value you are claiming for must be less than £1 billion
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.negative: The maximum value you are claiming for must be £0.00 or above
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.invalidFormat: Enter the maximum value of your claim in the correct format, for example £148.00 or £148.50
